news.summary: <p>ISLAMABAD: In an interesting show of lampooning, the National Electric Power Reg­ulatory Authority (Nepra) publicly confirmed that revenue-based loadshedding is illegal, but the Power Division rejected this, saying the practice would continue nevertheless to avoid the addition of Rs400bn to

news.headline: Trump to feature on limited-edition US passports for 250th anniversary
news.summary: The passports are part of broader plans to celebrate the milestone anniversary of the US Declaration of Independence.
